sglang.title: Support Triton fp8 e5m2 kv cache
sglang.author: ispobock

Motivation
Previously fp8 kv cache for Flashinfer was supported in #1204.
This PR support this feature for Triton runtime.

sglang.title: [triton] Remove the zero initialization of qk_acc by directly writing the result
sglang.author: ByronHsu
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation

Currently, we do tl.zeros + tl.dot just to write qk to acc, but this can be simplified thanks to https://triton-lang.org/main/python-api/generated/triton.language.dot.html#triton.language.dot. Maybe triton compiler already does the optimization, but it is good to keep the code simple.
Mo

Motivation
Rename model_overide_args to model_override_args. However, model_overide_args seems to be a user-facing API that is used by srt_example_llava_v.py. Therefore, this PR introduces a breaking change.

sglang.title: Allow new lines during JSON generation
sglang.author: qeternity
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
By default, Outlines does not permit new lines and whitespace formatting during constrained JSON generation. Their rationale is that smaller models have a tendency to enter infinite generation loops otherwise. I have not observed this behavior with any recent smaller models (Llama 3.1 8B

Motivation

This PR fixes the wrong regex vocab mask when there are constraint decoding and normal decoding in the same batch.

sglang.title: Fix hang when doing s += None.
sglang.author: max99x
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
SGLang will terminate the worker thread if you append a None to a ProgramState because None is used as a sentinel to signal the executor to terminate. This results in the program silently hanging when anything that waits on the worker is read from the state.
Repro script:
@sglang.function
